title: Labour Market and Related Insecurities
abstract: Jane E. Ferrie, Michael G. Marmot, John Griffiths and Erio Ziglio (eds.J, Labour Market Changes and Job Insecurity: A Challenge For Social Welfare and Health Promotion, Copenhagen, Denmark: WHO Regional Publications, European Series, No. 81,1999, paper, Sw.fr. 52, xiii+252 pp. Jens Lind and Iver Hornemann Moller (eds.J, Inclusion and Exclusion: Unemployment and Non-Standard Employment in Europe, Aldershot: Ashgate, 1999, £37.50, x+230 pp. John Vail, Jane Wheelock and Michael Hill (eds.J, Insecure Times: Living and Insecurity in Contemporary Society, London: Routledge, 1999, £16.99, xii+234 pp. Brendan Burchell, Diana Day, Maria Hudson, David Lapido, Roy Mankelow, Jane P. Nolan, Hannah Reed, Ines C. Wichert and Frank Wilkinson, Job Insecurity and Work Intensification: Flexibilty and the Changing Boundaries of Work, York: Joseph Rowntree Foundation, 1999, paper, £13.95, V+74PP Fernando G. Benavides and Joan Benach, Precarious Employment and Health-Related Outcomes in the European Union, Dublin: European Foundation for the Improvement of Living and Working Conditions, 1999, EUR 16, xii+61 pp.
